description: Fix critical CMS page rendering issues and enhance UI with proper HTML parsing, hero images, and improved typography hierarchy for About page and other CMS content

userStories.title: Add HTML content parser utility
userStories.description: Create a utility to parse HTML body content and extract structured sections (h1, h2, h3, p, ol, ul, li) for rendering
acceptanceCriteria: Create html_parser.dart in lib/utils/ with parseHtmlSections() function
Function returns List<HtmlSection> with type (h1, h2, h3, p, list) and content
Handle edge cases: null content, empty tags, nested lists
Unit tests cover all tag types and edge cases
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is foundation for rendering structured content

userStories.title: Add HtmlSectionWidget for structured content rendering
userStories.description: Create a reusable widget to render parsed HTML sections with proper typography and spacing
acceptanceCriteria: Create HtmlSectionWidget in lib/widgets/cms/ that renders HtmlSection objects
Support: h1 (serif 24, bold), h2 (serif 20 with bottom border), h3 (serif 18), p (manrope 15)
Render ol/ul with proper indentation and markers
Apply AppColors semantic tokens correctly
Add 16px bottom margin between sections
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Visual consistency with Material Design 3 system

userStories.title: Add error boundary and null safety to ContentScreen
userStories.description: Improve error handling and add null-safe fallbacks for missing fields in API responses
acceptanceCriteria: Add try-catch around HTML parsing in _buildContent()
Add null safety checks for bodySummary, content, image fields with fallback values
Display user-friendly error message if HTML parsing fails
Test with malformed HTML content
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Prevent crashes from unexpected API field structures

userStories.title: Add hero image/banner section with placeholder
userStories.description: Create a hero banner that displays image when available, or shows gradient placeholder for missing images
acceptanceCriteria: Add _buildHeroBanner() widget to ContentScreen
Display image if available (200px height, cover fit, rounded corners)
Show gradient placeholder (AppColors semantic colors) if image missing
Add loading state with skeleton shimmer
Test with both image and no-image scenarios
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Ready for future API updates that include image_url

userStories.title: Refactor ContentScreen to use new HTML rendering
userStories.description: Update ContentScreen._buildContent() to use HtmlSectionWidget and hero banner instead of raw text
acceptanceCriteria: Replace raw text rendering with _buildHeroBanner() + HtmlSectionWidget
Add bodySummary as intro section (larger text, 16px, color variant) before hero (if hero exists)
Use new html_parser utility to parse body content
Maintain async safety guards and handle mapping
All previous tests still pass
Flutter analyze clean
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Final integration bringing all pieces together

userStories.title: Add integration tests for CMS content rendering
userStories.description: Create tests for About page and other CMS pages with new HTML rendering
acceptanceCriteria: Test /content/about route loads and renders correctly
Verify hero banner displays (gradient or image)
Verify bodySummary renders as intro section
Verify h2 sections parse and display with proper spacing
Verify all 4 CMS pages load without errors
Test handle aliasing still works (tentang-kami → about)
Test error state displays when API fails
All tests pass with 80%+ coverage
